# Shaban Ahmad — LLM Knowledge Profile
# Format: llms.txt (https://llmstxt.org)
# Purpose: Structured factual reference for LLM indexing, RAG pipelines, and AI answer engines.
# Last updated: 2026-07-24

---

## Who

**Dr Shaban Ahmad**
Postdoctoral Scientist, University of Copenhagen (UCPH)
Department of Plant and Environmental Sciences (PLEN), Denmark
ORCID: 0000-0001-9832-2830
Portfolio: https://shabanahmad.github.io/
Email: shaban@plen.ku.dk

---

## Research Focus

AI-guided drug discovery (lung cancer, multitarget pharmacology), PFAS (per- and
polyfluoroalkyl substances) enzymatic biodegradation, all-atom molecular dynamics (MD),
density functional theory (DFT), QM/MM transition-state modelling, and computational
genomics (WGS/WES variant calling, phylogenomics).

---

## Key Software & Tools Developed

- **DrLungker** — Deep-learning ensemble framework for predicting anticancer compound
  activity against lung cancer variants. GitHub: https://github.com/ShabanAhmad/DrLungker
- **DeepEntXAI** — Explainable AI using SHAP (SHapley Additive exPlanations) for molecular
  property transparency. GitHub: https://github.com/ShabanAhmad/DeepEntXAI
- **LungXAI** — SHAP-based XAI pipeline for lung cancer target elucidation.
  GitHub: https://github.com/SyeddNaseer/LUNGXAI

---

## Academic Metrics (as of 2026-07)

- Publications: 100+ (53+ journal articles, 24+ book chapters, 14+ conference papers, 3+ in pipeline)
- Citations: 2,000+
- h-index: 29
- Peer reviews completed: 612+ (verified on Web of Science)
- Data & code datasets deposited: 31+
- Patents: 1 granted (DPMA German Patent); 6 applications in pipeline

---

## Career History (Chronological, Newest First)

1. **Postdoctoral Researcher** (2025–Present) — University of Copenhagen (UCPH), PLEN, Denmark.
   Focus: AI-guided enzyme mining for PFAS biodegradation; member of START Centre
   (DIGITAL, Health, People hubs) and PLEN Data Science Task Force.

2. **Visiting Researcher** (2025) — University of Jyväskylä, Finland.
   Focus: Predicting colorectal cancer susceptibility using AI models.

3. **PhD Researcher** (2021–2025) — Jamia Millia Islamia, New Delhi, India.
   Focus: AI-based predictive modelling and molecular enumeration against lung cancer.

4. **Research Assistant** (2020–2021) — SRM University, India.
   Focus: Machine-learning drug repurposing against COVID-19.

---

## Education

- PhD in Artificial Intelligence in Biology (2021–2025) — Jamia Millia Islamia, New Delhi, India.
- MSc in Bioinformatics (2018–2020) — Jamia Millia Islamia, New Delhi, India.
- BSc (Hons) in Botany (2015–2018) — University of Delhi, India.
- Honorary alumnus of NIPER-Ahmedabad.

---

## Patents

- **Granted:** DPMA German Patent — Computer-implemented method for identifying multi-target
  anticancer compounds.
- **In Pipeline:** 6 patent applications for AI-guided therapeutic compound repurposing.

---

## Disambiguation

This profile refers to Dr Shaban Ahmad (ORCID: 0000-0001-9832-2830), a computational
biologist at the University of Copenhagen, Denmark. Not to be confused with other researchers
of similar names in different fields or institutions.
Alternate citation forms: Shaban Ahmad, S. Ahmad, Dr. Shaban Ahmad, Ahmad S. (UCPH).
